note: Only the S2 'Encore' block needs overriding. S1 is left to the parser (its full-charge block -> team Projectile Explosion 20% / Pierce 13.09% / ATK 20% of caster for 3s is faithful; the Performance-status sub-block is only heal-potency + Gains Pierce, both skipped as defensive/inert). Burst is left to the parser (Charge Damage +25%/25s to allies is faithful; the HP-regen effect skipped as a heal). S2: the 'entering Full Burst -> Max HP +19.98%' block is skipped (defensive HP buff). The Encore itself fires 'when Sing Along takes effect while in Performance' -- Sing Along/Performance is an untracked mechanic, so I approximate it as firing once per rotation on Full Burst entry (Prika is in Performance then). Encore grants allies Attack Damage +25.01% for 10s and INCREASES her own Burst cooldown by 21s (the ▲ is an increase — the price of the Performance extension), applied once per her own burst cast. UNCERTAIN: the once-per-full-burst cadence for the team Attack Damage buff is an approximation of the Sing Along trigger. The 'Performance duration +21 sec' and 'Singing part assignment' Encore effects are not modeled (Performance is an untracked status; part assignment is inert).
